meta.title: DocsPress Kitchen Sink
meta.author: f
meta.description: A complete DocsPress acceptance site covering the active theme, every installed plugin, every documentation block, and their meaningful option states.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php'; $blocks = 'docspress-blocks/docspress-blocks.php'; if ( file_exists( WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/' . $blocks ) && ! is_plugin_active( $blocks ) ) { activate_plugin( $blocks ); } wp_clean_themes_cache(); foreach ( wp_get_themes() as $slug => $theme ) { if ( 'DocsPress' === $theme->get( 'Name' ) ) { switch_theme( $slug ); require get_theme_root( $slug ) . '/' . $slug . '/playground/setup.php'; break; } }
